title: Guest Post || Simply Homemade Magazine
excerpt: Simply Homemade is doing a 12 Days of Christmas craft feature. Various participants were asked to do different days. You can see 3 French Hens from House of Humble, 2 Turtle Doves from Cupcakes for Clara, and a Partridge In…
body:
Simply Homemade is doing a 12 Days of Christmas craft feature. Various participants were asked to do different days. You can see 3 French Hens from House of Humble, 2 Turtle Doves from Cupcakes for Clara, and a Partridge In a Pear Tree from Hello Hydrangea. My project is up today for 4 Calling Birds.

Supplies: Studio Calico Ethereal Paper || Lawn Fawn Stamps || Pow Glitter Paper || Hero Arts Shadow Ink You can see the list of full supplies and instructions on Simply Homemade's blog.
